arts.ttl: Olmo in limbo as La Liga and Spanish FA rule against Barca
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Dani Olmo and forward Pau Victor have been blocked from playing in the rest of the 2024-25 season by Spain's football authorities.

After it was reported in the last couple of days that Girona were looking to sign Eric Garcia, a second Barcelona player has now appear on their radar.
